criteria detail: Design-led airport hotel with geometric façade and vast, open lobby.8 minute drive from PwC offices
name: Hilton Amsterdam Airport Schiphol

criteria detail: A 2-minute walk from Amsterdam South train station, this contemporary hotel in a sleek high-rise is 3 km from the Van Gogh Museum and 6 km from the Anne Frank House. - 17 minute drive from PwC offices
name: INNSiDE Amsterdam

criteria detail: Down-to-earth 4-star hotel overlooking the Rembrandtpark10 minute drive from PwC offices
name: Leonardo Hotel Amsterdam Rembrandtpark

criteria detail: Upscale 4-star airport hotel13 minute drive from PwC offices
name: Radisson Blu Amsterdam Airport

criteria detail: Modern extended-stay hotel near Schiphol Airport with apartment-style suites, approximately 10km from Amsterdam city center9 minute drive from PwC offices
name: Residence Inn by Marriott Amsterdam Schiphol Airport

criteria detail: Contemporary 4-star hotel set in a polished redbrick building opposite the World Fashion Centre, 15 mins by tram from the city centre.9 minute drive from PwC offices
name: WestCord Fashion Hotel Amsterdam
